# Residue - Digital NFC Business Cards

Residue creates premium NFC-enabled business cards for professionals who want a cleaner, more modern way to share identity, contact details, and key links with a single tap.

## Overview
- Premium NFC business cards designed for intentional, high-quality networking.
- Tap-to-share digital identity without forcing the other person to install an app.
- Built for professionals, founders, creatives, and brands that care about presentation.

## Products
- Stainless steel NFC business cards
- Custom company logo business cards
- Digital profile pages linked to each card

## Core Features
- NFC tap-to-share functionality
- Digital profile page with contact, social, and business links
- Custom card layout options
- Optional custom logo card production
- Contact saving and social profile sharing
- Local South African focus for service and delivery

- Home: https://www.residue.cc/

## Website
https://www.residue.cc/

## Purpose
Residue modernizes professional networking through premium physical cards linked to refined digital identity pages, combining tactile presentation with instant mobile accessibility.
